info.title: 2S-API
info.description: The 2S-API is a RESTful API for interacting with the 2S Platform.

scopes.api://303a7632-ecfd-4eb7-af9b-be2043eaf2: Allows the app to read annotations
Allows the app to modify or create annotations
Allows the app to read configuration
Allows the app to modify or create configuration
Allows the app to see secrets in configuration
Allows the app to read commons
Allows the app to modify or create commons
Allows the app to access the web API on your behalf
